creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
We are several versions past Netbeans 8.1 (the version at the time
this bug was created).  It is not clear if this is still relevant.

No evidence was presented that this bug is FreBSD exclusive and
caused by our port.  It should be reported upstream first.  If there
is something we can and should fix in the port let use know.

I'm going to close this bug now, because I fear it might stay open
forever otherwise.
